title: Begin Manual Axis Referencing Setup on the Visu_Dual_MCP Screen
summary: Open the operator station HMI to the Visu_Dual_MCP screen using F3 and press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle. This establishes the documented starting condition for manual axis referencing described in the source manual, but the remaining manual referencing steps are not present in the supplied source packet.
when_to_use: Use when preparing the OptiSweep operator station for the documented manual axis referencing procedure in section 7.3.1.2, where the source states the end effector can be manually moved into position for maintenance procedures using the HMI.
not_for: Do not use this as a complete manual axis referencing procedure because the supplied source excerpt only includes the initial setup steps.
Do not continue into manual movement or referencing actions unless the missing source instructions are available and reviewed.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the HMI navigation and stop the automatic tipping cycle to place the system into the documented starting condition for manual axis referencing.

safety_notes: The source states that the end effector can be manually moved into position for maintenance procedures using the HMI.
Because the supplied source packet does not include the remaining manual referencing steps, stop after the documented setup actions.

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: Operator station HMI is available for navigation
Automatic tipping cycle is active or available to be stopped from the operator station HMI
external_references: Official manual: section 7.3.1.2 Manually Referencing Axes, page 103

visual_references.description: Operator station HMI screen artifact associated with manually referencing axes during maintenance procedures on page 103.
Operator station HMI artifact from page 103 showing the manual axis referencing context and nearby instructions to navigate to Visu_Dual_MCP and press CYCLE STOP.
Operator station control panel reference showing CYCLE STOP and related HMI controls.

steps.title: Open the Visu_Dual_MCP screen
steps.purpose: Place the operator station HMI on the documented screen used to begin manual axis referencing setup.
steps.instruction: On the operator station HMI, navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen using F3.
steps.expected_result: The operator station HMI displays the Visu_Dual_MCP screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The correct operator station screen is open and available for the next action.
steps.failure_condition: The Visu_Dual_MCP screen does not open or the operator cannot confirm the correct screen is displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator station HMI screen associated with manually referencing axes on page 103.
Operator station HMI artifact on page 103 showing the manual referencing context and the Visu_Dual_MCP navigation instruction.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Visu_Dual_MCP screen cannot be accessed from the operator station HMI.
Stop if the displayed screen cannot be confirmed as the documented Visu_Dual_MCP screen.

steps.title: Stop the automatic tipping cycle
steps.purpose: Establish the documented stopped condition before any further manual axis referencing activity.
steps.instruction: Press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.
steps.expected_result: The automatic tipping cycle is stopped.
steps.healthy_condition: The tipping cycle is no longer running and the system matches the documented starting condition for manual axis referencing.
steps.failure_condition: The automatic tipping cycle continues running or does not respond to CYCLE STOP.

actions.label: Press CYCLE STOP
actions.exact_action: Press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator station HMI context for manual axis referencing where CYCLE STOP is part of the documented setup.
Page 103 operator station artifact associated with the instruction to press CYCLE STOP.
CYCLE STOP control on the operator station control panel reference.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if CYCLE STOP does not stop the automatic tipping cycle.
Do not continue beyond this point because the remaining manual referencing procedure is not included in the supplied source packet.

success_criteria: The operator station HMI is on the Visu_Dual_MCP screen.
The automatic tipping cycle is stopped.
The system matches the documented starting condition for manual axis referencing from the supplied source.
healthy_conditions: Visu_Dual_MCP is displayed on the operator station HMI.
No undocumented manual referencing actions have been attempted beyond the supplied setup steps.
failure_conditions: Unable to access the Visu_Dual_MCP screen.
CYCLE STOP does not stop the automatic tipping cycle.
Procedure cannot continue because the remaining manual axis referencing instructions are not present in the supplied source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate for SME or maintenance review if the Visu_Dual_MCP screen cannot be accessed or confirmed.
Escalate if the automatic tipping cycle does not stop when CYCLE STOP is pressed.
Escalate before attempting any additional manual axis referencing or end effector movement not explicitly included in the supplied source packet.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Manual axis referencing operator station HMI context on page 103.
Page 103 operator station artifact associated with Visu_Dual_MCP and CYCLE STOP instructions.
Operator station control panel reference showing CYCLE STOP.

missing_details: The supplied source packet does not include the remaining manual axis referencing steps after opening Visu_Dual_MCP and pressing CYCLE STOP.
No source-supported completion criteria for the full manual referencing procedure are available in the packet.
No source-supported production stop or LOTO requirement is explicitly stated in the supplied packet.
